title: Montana's Variated Mushrooms
description: A resource pack that adds a total of 32 new variants to the little mushrooms in the game.
body:
This mod variates the in-game mushrooms. each mushroom: red, brown, warped, and crimson get 7 new textures per block, alongside their original textures.
Vanilla Tweak's Variated Red Mushroom Blocks compliments this pack well, which can be found [Here](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)
